strategy: Do not target The Monster on Rounds 1 and 2. He is untargetable, and aiming at him forces you to Pass. Set up blades and traps instead; he is targetable from Round 3.
Kill his summoned Memory of Katzenstein minions before him. Killing the boss with minions up revives him for 25% Health (1,012).
Avoid charms, heals-over-time, and damage-over-time on your side. Each triggers a punish: Banshee, Triton, or a reflected Stormzilla. Use plain blades and a direct hit.

Your chosen Monstrology Note sets which minion and cheats appear, such as the Death Note punishing minion kills or the Storm Note adding random Wild Bolts. Pick the Note whose cheat you can play around.
Hit Ice or Myth, +15% each. At 4,050 Health one stacked hit finishes him once the minions are clear.
cheatNotes: Round 1 he makes himself untargetable.
Any spell aimed at him that Round forces you to Pass; spells not aimed at him still go off. Do not target him Round 1.
If you picked no Monstrology Note or Note 1, he summons the Balance Katzenstein minion.
He becomes targetable again from Round 3.
Killing him before all his minions are dead revives him for 25% Health (1,012). Clear minions first.
Any helpful charm you cast makes him Banshee the Wizard who received it.
Any heal-over-time you cast makes him Triton the Wizard who received it.
Any damage-over-time you cast makes its recipient Stormzilla the caster, so damage-over-time backfires.
Note 1 summons the Balance minion on Round 1.
With the Balance minion up, every trap you cast triggers Trap Dilution on all enemies, weakening your traps. Avoid traps during this Note.
Note 2 summons the Death minion on Round 1.
With the Death minion up, defeating any minion makes him deal 25% max Health to the killer per minion defeated.
This still fires even if the Death minion itself was among those killed.
Note 3 summons the Fire minion at the end of Round 2.
With Note 3, at the end of Round 3 he casts a +50% outgoing damage global for his side.
Note 4 summons the Ice minion at the end of Round 2, or the Round after previous minions die.
The Ice minion Mega Taunts every other Round starting the Round after it is active, forcing your hits onto it.
Note 5 summons the Life minion at the end of Round 3, or the Round after previous minions die.
Note 6 summons the Myth minion at the end of Round 3, or the Round after previous minions die.
With the Myth minion up, after he damages a Wizard he casts an all-enemies Hex on his side.
Note 7 summons the Storm minion at the end of Round 3, or the Round after previous minions die.
With the Storm minion up, he randomly casts Wild Bolt on a random Wizard at the end of the Round.
